# Studio•Bamo.J®

> A creative studio building distinctive digital experiences with motion, type, and WebGL.

## Pages

- [Home](http://localhost:3000/): Studio overview
- [About](http://localhost:3000/about): Studio philosophy and practice
- [Work](http://localhost:3000/work): Selected projects and case studies
- [Contact](http://localhost:3000/contact): Get in touch

## Notes

This site is rendered as a SPA — full content is hydrated client-side. AI
crawlers that execute JavaScript will see the same content a browser does.

Sitemap available at /sitemap.xml. robots.txt at /robots.txt declares the
allow/block policy for individual AI bots (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot,
etc.) — check there for the current state.

## Editing this file

For a real project: replace the absolute URLs above with the production
domain (matching NUXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL in .env), update the site description
to the client's, and adjust the page list as routes evolve. See
.claude/skills/aeo/SKILL.md for the full per-project setup.
